node.text: Deborah has a pendant that reminds her of her mother.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "symbolic gifts mothers") on Session 1 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: Deborah's mom loved flowers, and they always made her happy.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "symbolic gifts mothers") on Session 20 (Score: 0.98)

node.text: The beach where Deborah got married and discovered her love for surfing holds special memories of joy and peace for her.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "symbolic gifts mothers") on Session 28 (Score: 0.93)

node.text: Deborah's experience with her mother's friends allowed her to appreciate her mother more and gain a new perspective on her life.

node.text: Deborah's mom was interested in art and believed it could give out strong emotions and uniquely connect people.

node.text: Yoga helped Deborah find peace during a rough time, inspiring her to share it with others.

node.text: Deborah reconnected with her late mother's friends, which brought up a mix of emotions but overall was comforting.

node.text: Deborah looked through her mother's photos with her friends and found it sweet and nostalgic.
